fields.heading: Support Worker Jobs in London
fields.sub: Support worker jobs across Greater London with Vigil Care Staffing — flexible assignments in supported living and community care with a directly-vetted, DBS-checked agency.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
fields.image_alt: A care worker supporting a resident in a London care setting

fields.heading: Support worker assignments across London
fields.body: As a support worker with Vigil Care Staffing you help adults live as independently as possible in supported-living, community and care settings across Greater London. Assignments range from short-notice cover to ongoing placements, so you can build a pattern of work that fits your life. We are a directly-vetting, DBS-checked agency — we employ our people properly and check right-to-work documents on file — and we respond to every query within 15 minutes. Tell us the areas of London you can travel to and the hours you prefer, and we will match you to suitable support-worker assignments. If you also have healthcare-assistant experience, we can offer a wider range of shifts.

items.title: Supported living
items.body: Help adults with daily living, routines and community access in supported-living settings.

items.title: Community support
items.body: Support people in their own homes and in the community to stay independent and well.

items.title: Flexible shifts
items.body: Choose short-notice cover or ongoing assignments in the parts of London you can reach.

items.q: What does a support worker assignment involve?
items.a: Supporting adults with daily living, routines, wellbeing and community access, always in line with the service's care plan.

items.q: Which areas of London do you cover?
items.a: We place support workers across Greater London. Tell us where you can travel to and we will match you to nearby assignments.

fields.heading: Ready to start your next care assignment?
fields.sub: Apply once and our team will talk through the assignments that fit you.
fields.cta_label: Apply to Join Vigil Care Staffing
